data.reason: My grandfather was sick a few month sudden he left..
I am out of the country and my flight got delayed
I am feeling sick. I took early leave at 11.10a.m.
Assalamualaikum, due to family emergency, need this early leave.
I have severe headache and blocked nose and ears due to a bad cold, and also blurry vision because of severe headache. That's why I am unable to take the class.
I am sick, after taking all the class feeling more sick
Accidentally fell and injured my hip.
I cant continue my class for my migrain. so I have to leave  early.
I have my MA fina exam. Hani maam will take pre play Morning shift & Pushpu maam will take the day shift.

My health condition is not good. I have a fever, and my eyes are getting red. I am also unable to move my neck properly and have some other health issues. The doctor has advised me to take proper rest.
Due to illness, I am unable to come today. I kindly request you to grant me sick leave for the day.
I need to go to outside Chittagong in urgent.
I have an endoscopy scheduled in the  morning, for which I must remain on an empty stomach. I also have several additional medical tests to complete.
I am unable to attend today due to a high fever of 102.5°, along with severe tonsillitis and throat pain.
